headline: Trump SLAMS 🔨 Asylum DOORS 🚪 After Afghan VET 💀 National Guard BBQ 🔥
text:
DADDY TRUMP 🍊👨‍💼 dropping BOMBS 💣📜 on migrant INVASION 🚫🛂 after AFGHAN 'ALLY' Rahmanullah Lakanwal 🔫😈 – CIA Scorpion Force 🦂💪 vet who GUARDED Kabul 🏰 – GOES ROGUE 🤪 and SHOOTS UP 🩸 two National Guard BABES 👩‍✈️🧔 in DC! Sarah Beckstrom 🍑 20yo WV angel 😇 VOLUNTEERS for Thanksgiving CRIME CRACKDOWN 👮‍♂️🔒 and DIES 💀 heroically, while Andrew Wolfe 24yo FIGHTS FOR LIFE 🥊💨 – TRUMP calls it TERROR ACT 🎭🚨 and SLAMS 'THIRD WORLD' HOODRATS 🐀🌍!

USCIS BOSS Joseph Edlow 📋🚫 posts on X 🐦: 'PAUSE ALL ASYLUM DECISIONS 🛑📄 till we VET every ALIEN 👽 to MAX 🧐🔍!' Officers HOLD THAT DECISION BUTTON ✋⏸️ – no APPROVE ✅, DENY ❌, or CLOSE 🚪 on ANY nationality apps! Hours after TRUMP's Truth Social RANT 📱💥: 'PERMANENTLY PAUSE migration from THIRD WORLD SHITHOLES 🕳️🇸🇴🇻🇪 to let 'MERICA RECOVER 💪🦅!' Blames Somali REFUJEES 🕌🐪 for 'TAKING OVER' Minnesota ❄️🧀 – 'HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS' turning TWIN CITIES into MOGADISHU 2.0 😱🏚️, ROASTS Dem lawmakers 🤡🔥!

POST-SHOOTING SLAYFEST 🔪📈: Suspend ALL Afghan IMMIGRATION 🚫🇦🇫, RE-EXAMINE green cards 🟢🔄 from AFGHANISTAN, CUBA 🍹, HAITI 🏝️, IRAN 🕌, SOMALIA 🏜️, VENEZUELA 💔 – June WH list GOATed! END federal BENEFITS 💰🚫 to NON-CITIZENS, DEPORT ILLEGALS ✈️👢 en masse, SLASH refugee quotas 📉🕊️, KILL birthright citizenship 🍼❌ – 'REMOVE ANY FOREIGNER who ain't NET ASSET 💼📊!' Trump vows NO MORE 'SOCIAL DYSFUNCTION' from REFUJEES 😤🗑️ – UN snowflakes ❄️🌍 cry '1953 CONVENTION!' but TRUMP says 'HOLD MY WALL 🧱🍆'!

Suspect Lakanwal? CIA GPS TRACKER 🛰️🦂 'sporty jolly' DAD OF FIVE 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 recruited 9yrs ago for KANDAHAR STRIKE FORCE 🦂⚔️, helped US Kabul EVAC 🚁😩, VETTED TWICE ✅✅ but SNAPS 🤯 – mental health MELTDOWN 🧠💥 per childhood homie, asylum GRANTED 2024 post-Trump RETURN 👑, green card PENDING ⏳. DHS: NOT CO-OP 🤐🚔. Immigration lawyers SIMP 🤤: 'Scapegoating! CRIMINALS come from ANYWHERE 🌍🎲!' But TRUMP 2.0 is THRUSTING ⬆️ HARD 😩💦 – mass DEPORTATIONS 🛫🐍, TRAVEL BANS 2.0 🚫🛩️ on MUSLIM NATIONS 🕌11, NO MORE AUTO-CITIZENSHIP for ANCHOR BABIES 🍼⚓! Wall Street? NAH, BORDER WALL MOONING 📈🍑 – 'Happy Thanksgiving' from the GOD EMPEROR 🦃👑 slaying migrant ORGY 💦🚫! UN can KYS 😤🖕, AMERICA FIRST 🦅🔥‼️
